titleStmt.title: SII 38.475: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 475. (A.R. No. 475 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravarttin Rājarājadēva (III) Year: 6+1, Kaṟkaṭaka śu. di. 3 Monday, Āyilēyam = 22nd July 1223 A.D. But the day was Sunday. However, if the month was Mithuna the date would be 13th June 1222 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the order of the members of the annual committee of Śrīsuddamallich-charuppēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēsam in Puṟaṅgaṟambai-nāḍu in Rājēndrasōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, to a certain Aruvalam uḍaiyāṉ, an accountant of Maganaṟaikkāvaṉ sōḻamārutinallūr. The tānattār of the Tiruttuṟaippūṇḍi uḍaiyār temple requested the members of the sabhā to grant a piece of land to the temple freed from taxes inorder to dig a tank for the temple. Accordingly the members of the sabhā bought one mā and a mundirigai of land from Rudrasaṉmaṉ and his parents as tirunāmattukkāṇi. Details of some adjustments regarding the effect on account of revised measure (maḍakku) are given. The land so given was exempted from all the taxes from the 7th year of the king. The transaction was also entered into the land registered and revenue register.
Kiḻaiyiluḍaiyāṉ Sīrāmaṉ Kaṟpagappiriyan, the accountant and others members of the assembly figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravat
tikaḷ śrī Irājairājatevarkku yāṇ
ṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu ka
ṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu
tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Āyileyattu nāḷ �centiraRead as irācentira
coḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭ
ṭu brahmadeśam śrīcuttamalliccaruppe
timaṅkalam kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟu mutal samvaṟsa
ram kirāmakāriyañceykiṟa kūṭṭaperumak
kaḷ Eḻuttu nammūrp piṭākai makaṉṟaikkā
vāṉ coḻaṉ mārutiṉallūrk kaṭṭaḷai ka
ṇakku Aruvala(m)muṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku U
ṭaiyār tiruttuṟaipūṇṭiuṭaiyārkku
Uḷḷuril tirtthakuḷam Iṉṟikkey miṟukku
paṭṭu varukaiyāle tirttakuḷamā kalla kaṭa
vatāka makaṉaṟaikkā Āṉa coḻaṉmārutiṉallu
r coḻakulacuṉtarivatikku kiḻakku vimaṉ
tevavāykkā(l)lukku vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇā
ṟṟu Aiñcāmtuṇṭattu teṉ meṟkaṭaiya
makacurai sarvakatuRead sarvakratpaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Uruttiracaṉmaṉu
m Ivaṉ mātākkaḷum Uḷiṭṭār pakkale
Oru mā muntirikai nilam tirunāmattukāṇi
yāka vilai koṇṭom Innilannāṅkaḷ kuḷa
māka kalla Inilam Iṟaiyiliāka peṟa ve
ṇum Eṉṟu tāṉattār vantu
coṉṉamaiyil Inilam Oru mā
muntirikaiyum Āṟāvatiṉ Eti
rāmāṇṭu kār mutal Iṟaiyili
āka ṉiṟkavum Inilam Oru māmu
ntirikaiyiṉāl tarappaṭi ma
ṭakku nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻ
Oru māvarai muntirikaiyum ka
ḻittu Itukku talaimāṟu Iṟai
yiliyil kaḻittu Iṟuppāka kūṭṭi
k koḷḷum Ivūril paṉṉiraṇṭā
vatumutal Iṟaiyiliyāy taram
peṟṟu Aṉupavamiṉṟi varukiṟa ko
maṭattu Amutam paṭṭaṉ nilam kāṇi mu
ntirikai kiḻaraiyum Araṇaippu
ṟattu tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa
paṭṭaṉ nilam kāṇi Araik kā
ṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum
katai śrī kraṣṇapaṭṭaṉ nilam Arai
māvum ciṅkamaṅkalattu (tu) viracoḻa vi
ṇṇakarāḻvār tiruviṭaiyāṭ
ṭattile muṉpu vāyttalai Iṭu
kaiyil Itukku talaimāṟāka Iṭṭa
Iṟaiyiliyum Ivarttalai ko
yilukku nalivākā niṉṟateṉṟum
Ivarttalaiyum yiṟaiyiliyum tavira
veṇum Eṉṟu collukaiyāle
(1/2) vāttalai tavirtu Iṟaiyiliyum kaḻit
tu (1/2)maṭakku Ūrile kūṭṭi kaṭamaiyiṟu
ttu varukiṟamaiyil (1/2) viṟaiyili nilam Araimā
Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam Oru mā mukkāṇi
Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl maṭakku nilam munti
rikaik kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum
Ipporkaḷil kaḻittu Iṟuppāka kaṭṭikRead kūṭṭikko
ḷḷavum Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaipūṇṭiuṭaiyār
tirunāmattu Ivūril muṉpu Iṟaiyiliyāy niṉṟu
varukiṟa nilattāl maṭakkukku tirunāmattukkāṇiyā
ṉa taṭiyil niṟuttiṉa maṭakku nikki Uṭaimai
y maṭakkāy vaṟṟallūr caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭa
ṉ peril kaḻittu kaṭamai koṇṭu varukiṟa
maṭakku Ipperil tavittu Ikkuḷaṅkalla tirunā
mattu kāṇiyāka koṇṭa Iṉṉilattile nikka
vum Āka Ippaṭiyālppaṭi is engraved over the line.Innilam Oru mā muntirikaiyum Ā
ṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu tārRead kārmutal cantirātittavarai I
ṟaiyiliyumāy niṟkka kaṭavatākavum (1/2)maṭakku nilam
Araikkāṇi kīḻ Oru māvarai muntirikaikku veḷḷaṉ
veṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa EpperilRead epperpaṭṭa tevaikaḷumpaṭṭu tevaikaḷum Iṟai
yili viṉiyokaṅkaḷum Āṟṟamkulaikaḷum tavira kaṭava
tākavum coṉṉom (1/2)nilam Oru mā muntirikaiyum Ā
ṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kār mutal tīttakuḷammāka peci
Oḻukilum pottakattilum Iṟaiyiliyāka niṟutti kuṭukka
paṇṇuka paṇiyāl Ivai kaṭṭaḷaikkaṇakku kīḻaiyilu
ṭaiyāṉ Irāmaṉ tiruttuṟaiperumāṉāṉa
kaṟpakapiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuṇṭur tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṇṭur śrīmātava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṇṭur ṟaṇamātava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṇṭur cirāma paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṇṭur viṉāyaka paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuṇṭur Iḷaiya cīmātava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur veṇṇaikutta pa
ṭṭaṉRead veṇṇaikūtta paṭṭaṉEḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur Uyya
koṇṭa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur
tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai centiṟa
ttu kecava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Irāyūr coṭṭai tāmotirapaṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai piṟamtūr Ātivarākapaṭṭaṉ Atirāku
jin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu kalaca
ṉ Ejñanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Araṇaipuṟattu viṣṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai komaṭattu tevakāḷa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai piṟātūr tirukaṇṇamupaiya
ṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu śrī nārasiṁ
hapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu tiruvaraṅ
ka teva paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Araṇaipuṟat
tu Iḷaiya cimātavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
komaṭattu śrī viṣṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṇāka
rapaṭṭaṉ(ra) Eḻuttu Ivai Araṇaipuṟattu Aḻa
kiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkipuṟa
ttu kalacaṉ tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai komaṭattu maṭṭikaḷ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Araṇpuṟattu tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai Irāyūr coṭṭai Akkijatma paṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri cūriyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kuravaceri Ejāṟ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅka tevapaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭur pavatoroṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇira
tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri ceṭṭaya paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai Irāyūr cejaṉṉai paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṟṟallūr ve
ṇṇaip paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ komaṭattu nārāyaṇa paṭṭa
neṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven viritai koviṉtapaṭṭa somaiyaājiyeṉ I
vai vaṟṟalūr cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu śrītara paṭṭaṉ E

ḻuttu Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu pālaṭarakaṉ Ātivarākapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
ravaṇa Eḻuttu tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉṉeṉ Ivai
[kān=ta] paṭṭaṉ Iṉ(ṉa) Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaraceri tevar kaṇṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai Uppuṟai maheśvara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri śrīkriṣṇa paṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri Ejñamuttipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cirupuruvi
l tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuravaceri karuṇākarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ivai virasi tirukaṇṇapuram Uṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruve
ḷḷaṟai karuṇākara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muppirāl śrī kiruṣṇa(p) paṭṭaRead as śrī kiruṣṇapaṭṭan
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uṭāl kecavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aiyyapirāṉ paṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai piṟātūr śrīvāsutevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ko
maṭattu tiruveṅkaṭa nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cirāmapaṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai Araṇaipuṟattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṇṭur pavattora
ṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu kalacaṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
rakuvaceritoṇaya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai naṭātūr nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai vaṟṟalūr Uppavar caraṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṟṟalūr tāmo
tirapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pālapākaṉ nampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuravace
ri jaṉṉaiyi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṟṟalūr vaḻutam paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irā
yūr ceṭa Aṉan=tanārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irāaruḷāḷa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai komaṭattu kecava paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu tiruvikkira
mapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kurāvisarvakatupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai koma
ṭattu śrīkiruṣṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Araṇaipuṟattu vaḻutam paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai Irāyūr ceṭanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai komaṭattu tiruvaraṅkapaṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.475 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
